channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin faces critical test as bulls aim to hold $60K: Did BTC bottom?
item.description: Bitcoin’s loose hold on $60,000 and soft futures markets raise questions about whether BTC has bottomed.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Donald Trump has 10 days to decide on housing bill with CBDC ban
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson transmitted a housing bill with a provision barring the US Federal Reserve issuing or creating a CBDC until 2030 to Donald Trump on Monday.

item.title: Ornith Is the Open-Source Coding Model Built for Agents, Not Humans
item.description: A new model built by DeepReinforce is meant for developers who want AI that finishes the job, not just autocompletes the next line.

item.title: Strategy Snaps 9-Day Losing Streak as Bitcoin Giant Adopts 'Robust' Capital Framework
item.description: Strategy's shares remained 42% down from its market-rattling Bitcoin sale nearly a month ago.

item.title: China Has Its Own Mythos Now, Says Qihoo 360 Founder. And One Version Is Free
item.description: Qihoo 360 unveiled a homegrown vulnerability-hunting AI this week—and Z.ai went further, releasing comparable capabilities as open-weight code anyone can download.

item.title: Senate leaders push for July passage of CLARITY Act
item.description: Lawmakers in the US Senate are on state work periods until July 13, giving them only four weeks to address a cryptocurrency market structure bill before another break and possible delays due to campaigning for elections.

item.title: Bitcoin put-call ratio hits 1-year high: Are bears preparing for drop to $55K?
item.description: Rising demand for put options and persistent ETF outflows highlight Bitcoin's weakness despite lower oil prices.

item.title: Supreme Court Says Trump Can Fire SEC, CFTC Commissioners at Will—At a Crucial Moment for Crypto
item.description: The court overturned a 91-year precedent, allowing President Trump to fire key federal regulators whenever he wishes for almost any reason.

item.title: Meta Unveils New Tech That Uses AI to Translate Brain Activity Into Text—Without Surgery
item.description: Meta says its latest Brain2Qwerty system translates brain activity into sentences using non-invasive brain recordings, improving the accuracy of AI-powered neural decoding.

item.title: Bitcoin Is in a Fight at $60K—Here's What the Charts Say
item.description: BTC kissed $58,800 and bounced. The daily chart is deep in bear territory, and prediction markets are betting on further pain before a rebound.

item.title: Bitcoin lending is entering a new institutional era, according to Silicon Valley Bank
item.description: The bank said bitcoin lending has emerged from the 2022 crypto credit collapse with stronger risk controls, growing institutional participation and a path toward lower borrowing costs.

item.title: Galaxy Slashes Clarity Act's 2026 Odds to 50% as Senate Time Runs Short
item.description: The digital asset firm cut its odds of the market structure bill passing this year to a coin toss, pointing to a shrinking Senate calendar.

item.title: XRP Ledger's 'Missing Layer' Draws Closer as Developers Test Lending, Credit Features: Ripple
item.description: Ripple outlined how the XRP Ledger Lending Protocol would provide institutions with a novel way to structure loans directly on-chain.

item.title: Bitcoin balances $60K tightrope as US stocks rebound on fresh Iran peace deal hopes
item.description: Bitcoin faced its own battle for support as US stocks headed higher and analysts warned of a lack of "conviction" among BTC buyers.

item.title: Coinbase, Kraken and OKX move to swoop up EU users affected by MiCA restrictions
item.description: Several exchanges that have already been authorized by EU regulators are attempting to bring in users from companies unlicensed under the Markets in Crypto-Assets rules, offering transfer bonuses and prizes.

item.title: JPMorgan urges strong safeguards as congress weighs crypto market structure rules
item.description: The bank says Congress should pair regulatory clarity with safeguards as Senate negotiates the Clarity Act.

item.title: California Strikes Deal With Anthropic to Bring Claude AI to State Agencies
item.description: Anthropic’s agreement makes Claude the first AI tool available to all state agencies and local governments, at half price.

item.title: BNY adds USDC minting and redemption to institutional custody platform
item.description: The move deepens BNY's partnership with Circle and builds on the bank's role as the primary custodian of USDC reserves.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. Senator Tim Scott says "The Senate should vote on crypto market structure legislation in July." "It’s time to deliver for the American people." 🙌 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1sQkY1N0d2Y3AzODVhUGF5N19lNE01ZEctZW9fUXE4aGo5Uk94Zmd6VmlaZGJEbVF1c2h3SHd0cUk3UEMxSDdHOW1wQ2FDWFg0NmlzN0xKemxBdzV0Wloyc0FvZ1AyX1k?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 U.S. Senator …

item.title: What Is Strategy (MSTR)? The Bitcoin Treasury Company
item.description: Software firm Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and its co-founder Michael Saylor have become synonymous with Bitcoin. Here’s what you need to know.

item.title: Private keys, not smart contracts, caused 40% of crypto's $16 billion hack losses. Here's whats being done.
item.description: The industry is moving toward fixing the private key vulnerability issue, just not evenly, Wish Wu, co-founder and CEO of Pharos, said.

item.title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
item.description: Officials from the White House are said to be sitting down with law enforcement representatives who have objected to illicit-finance portions of the bill.

item.title: J.P. Morgan broadens blockchain settlement network as banks modernize cross-border payments
item.description: The bank added five Asia-Pacific currencies to its Kinexys blockchain platform, allowing institutional clients to settle payments and FX around the clock.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds $43 Million in Ethereum as Strategy Halts Bitcoin Buys
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies continued adding to its Ethereum stockpile, even as its Bitcoin counterpart Strategy stood pat.

item.title: Crypto analytics firm Chainalysis proposes standards for blockchain tracing
item.description: The blockchain analysis company published a proposed ontology for how investigators can identify clusters of crypto addresses and link them together.

item.title: MiCA's looming deadline could leave 10 million crypto users without a platform in the EU
item.description: As MiCA takes full effect on July 1, SwissBorg's Alex Fazel told CoinDesk users should choose platforms built to withstand EU regulators' tightening oversight.

item.title: An Ontology for Accountability: Defining What Data Quality Means in Blockchain Analytics
item.description: We built this to be questioned Before I came to blockchain analytics, I spent years in academia studying the formal… The post An Ontology for Accountability: Defining What Data Quality Means in Blockchain Analytics appeared first on Chaina…

item.title: 10 Questions to Ask Your Blockchain Analytics Provider about Data Quality
item.description: Blockchain analytics tools provide critical intelligence to compliance teams, regulators, and investigators. These professionals use that intelligence to uncover illicit… The post 10 Questions to Ask Your Blockchain Analytics Provider abou…

item.title: Ripple wants institutions to borrow against tokenized assets on XRPL
item.description: A proposed XRPL standard would let institutions borrow against tokenized assets, with the blockchain enforcing loan terms while the underwriting stays with human credit teams. It still needs validator approval to go live.

item.title: Can AI drain DeFi? Separating Claude Mythos hype from reality
item.description: Claude Mythos has raised concerns about AI-driven attacks on DeFi protocols. However, the same AI tools are also available to security teams, not just attackers.

item.title: Wall Street's BNY expands stablecoin services for institutions, starting with Circle's USDC
item.description: The world's largest custody bank is adding USDC custody and minting services as stablecoins move deeper into traditional finance.

item.title: Strategy opens door to selling billions of bitcoin under new capital plan. Here's what it means
item.description: The company can now sell bitcoin to fund the USD reserve, support preferred dividends, and finance up to $2 billion in stock buybacks.

item.title: Ukraine transfers $8.3 million in seized crypto amid potential plans for strategic reserve
item.description: The funds were seized during an investigation into an international hacker group accused of laundering proceeds from data theft through high-value property.

item.title: BlackRock pushes deeper into DeFi with Ethena integration, sending ENA up 8%
item.description: The deal adds Ethena's yield-generating token to BlackRock's risk management platform and create a $100 million liquidity facility for BlackRock's tokenized money market fund.

item.title: I agree with @LeaderJohnThune: The Senate should vote on crypto market structure legislation in July. @BankingGOP advanced a bipartisan bill that would deliver clear rules of the road, protect consumers, and keep innovation in America. It’s time to deliver f - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE8xQmtRbTlieHVlWVpnUG53SUZkaDA3SFpxbHVYcXpjb2pWdEFtTUpnR1NaTEZMQkhycHN4dlZhTUtTSVNNVDJQYVk0TndyM0F2eDllZWF2bXJQOW1CME5Md0xyVVFZZ1E?oc=5" target="_blank">I agree with @LeaderJohnThu…

item.title: From Bitcoin critics to blockchain believers: The 5 biggest crypto backflips
item.description: If you can't beat 'em, join 'em. Here are five crypto skeptics who have reluctantly embraced the opportunity of making loads of money with blockchain.

item.title: Levered crypto plays are getting crushed: The 2x leveraged long MicroStrategy ETFs, $MSTX, and $MSTU, are both down -82% year-to-date, trading at their lowest levels since their 2024 debuts. At the same time, the 2x leveraged long MicroStrategy ETF, $M - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBRbG9oanNWQkFqeUJRLVNEdmpoR25YM29PMHV0eW5yYzFQam9vQVE4NE5LY2YzbnhSbUJmc2xkRTd0M1c0Ym9uQXIwWFh6eFVESnhRV1oxd2s1UzV1bTM5a2gtc2xjQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Levered crypto plays are get…

item.title: Strategy unveils capital framework to preserve Bitcoin exposure, pay dividends
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy unveiled a capital framework allowing Bitcoin sales to fund dividends, a $2.55 billion reserve and buybacks while raising STRC payout to 12%.

item.title: Breez launches Bitcoin-to-stablecoin payments across more than 30 blockchains
item.description: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.

item.title: If @saylor crushed Bitcoin when he announced the sale of just 32 Bitcoin, imagine the impact of today's announcement authorizing $MSTR to sell $3.25B worth of Bitcoin. At $60K, that's over 54,000 Bitcoin. Of course, as Bitcoin falls, more must be sold to raise - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9nbllUeTNxY1hVSlFVaWotdkpjdmQxNTNMTERkbFNFTWNtQUtIVzFaMmF1aGNTbWwyR19yckUyUXE3bGludUJfb3RzMTdWUVUzR2VtZmJwdFA0V1ZWUVBEYzBR?oc=5" target="_blank">If @saylor crushed Bitcoin when he…

item.title: Kalshi and Polymarket could become M&A targets as prediction markets consolidate: Bernstein
item.description: The broker said operational consolidation is blurring the lines between exchanges, brokerages and sportsbooks, creating conditions for acquisitions across the prediction market ecosystem.

item.title: Tom Lee blames crypto weakness on quarter-end 'window dressing' as Bitmine adds another $43 million of ETH
item.description: Bitmine made its smallest purchase since early May as Lee pointed to investors cutting losses before the start of the second half of the year.

item.title: Strategy Could Sell Up to $1.25B of Bitcoin Under 'Digital Credit Capital Framework'
item.description: The Bitcoin treasury firm has approved a framework for "active capital management," its Chair Michael Saylor said in a statement.

item.title: JPMorgan sees limited institutional demand for perpetual futures
item.description: The bank said institutional demand for perpetual futures remains muted, with the products better suited to speculative trading than hedging.

item.title: STRIVE BALANCE SHEET UPDATE • Bitcoin: ₿19,864 • Cash: $141.7M • STRC: $37.7M No $BTC purchases this week. Strive’s balance sheet is built to move aggressively or wait patiently with deep reserves, no debt, no margin & no encumbered Bitcoin. $A - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5ESkppQ3ZsU1c0cnNKSmdHQkkwMVRwSzl5UVJyWXJhZTJKT0YyOWJYYURhRzRyNjhqRUtxa1AyZHVNdzczYjBGOFdkTWlrcWEtZHdmSlJheS1LcHhFQ0Rr?oc=5" target="_blank">STRIVE BALANCE SHEET UPDATE • Bitcoin:…

item.title: $MSTR is now a Bitcoin seller. Under its just-announced “Bitcoin Monetization Program” it may sell Bitcoin for three purposes: to raise up to $1.25B to fund its USD reserve, to pay preferred dividends & debt interest, and to fund $1B of preferred and $1B of com - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBoSzhtVzBGRnRQWEZuVWVDWEFESThSSURkSkxNMUNVWTd6UElVVWJaMlJnYWZZTjAyaWtzUTdkOVRGUkxneGhGdzdUOGl2X2E0ZEtuUmw1ZDZ1ZjAzR0lSZHlB?oc=5" target="_blank">$MSTR is now a Bitcoin seller. Und…

item.title: Strategy Says It May Sell Up to $1.25 Billlion of Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1uVGViNGdOMU9FX1A5dFdUZTVKNmFXTTFPU0FYUEZiTDVXb1Y1Ul9POHJJZVhSNGRmSlQxMnlzU1U1R3pCNEdMZ3VjeVFDY0FFQm82X1lVTDNzdEtZMXZN?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy Says It May Sell Up to $1.25 …

item.title: Saylor's Strategy initiates buybacks and bitcoin monetization program, lifts STRC dividend
item.description: Strategy adopted a new capital management framework, authorizing up to $2 billion in buybacks while creating a program that allows future bitcoin sales to support liquidity.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's 'Strategy' launches a Bitcoin Monetization Program that allows the company to sell $BTC to fund operations. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5Kd19IT0tWRmdFaVpFSEVQNDdqSUhWb0NDT3p2aV9EVUhkdHJRaVVnRUNtWXhvbFFJcmV2Tlc0ZlFpelBRcFFNdGhMTFNheEY4SE1zaW1XcnhDZ1hxUUVwMTBB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's 'Strateg…

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor's Strategy announces a new framework to "preserve long-term Bitcoin exposure" with a "BTC monetization program" 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE82dkxuNU0xRlBRMmtyNDhNbXlDNlZGRXpTTUItc2FZUnRTNW9ReEhuMW04RlZSN1RaMk93b09oWTZ5OGdubTVuYl91dUtKa2VEV2FxeDMyVVZQQkIzeWFwQmhRMVI1OHc?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor's S…

item.title: Tether's USDT jumps to 8.5% premium in India after crypto payment crackdown
item.description: Raids on crypto payment firms in Bengaluru disrupted the pipeline that feeds dollar-pegged USDT to Indian platforms, pushing its local price more than 8.5% above the dollar, roughly double the usual gap.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says crypto’s most powerful idea isn't nearly ready for use
item.description: The Ethereum co-founder says indistinguishability obfuscation could one day act like a “trustless trusted third party,” but today’s versions remain far too slow for real use.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Headed for Rare Back-to-Back Quarterly Loss
item.description: Another $1.79B in ETF outflows last week certainly isn't helping—but if history repeats, there is reason for hope.

item.title: Dollar, U.S. Treasury yield market positions may carry glimmer of hope for bitcoin
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 29, 2026

item.title: FundBank becomes IRACE Digital in bid to bridge traditional finance and crypto
item.description: The institutional banking provider is expanding into digital asset custody, liquidity and execution services as former Zodia Custody Ireland CEO John Cronin takes the helm.

item.title: Prediction-market operational consolidation could spur M&A wave: Bernstein
item.description: Bernstein says platforms are bringing exchange, clearing and brokerage infrastructure in-house, setting up potential deals while increasing antitrust and regulatory risks.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin says obfuscation could unlock private onchain crypto voting
item.description: Vitalik Buterin said indistinguishability obfuscation could eventually support private, collusion-resistant onchain voting without trusted committees, though the technology remains impractical.

item.title: Ukraine Takes $8.3M in Seized Crypto Under State Management in a First
item.description: Over 8.3 million USDT seized from an alleged hacking ring has been moved to a wallet held by Ukraine's asset-recovery agency, ARMA.

item.title: Germany leads MiCA crypto authorization race as Europe’s deadline looms
item.description: MiCA crypto licensing data shows 244 approved companies across EU and EEA jurisdictions, led by Germany with France and the Netherlands also among top hubs ahead of July 1 cliff.
